description: Vite-first SSR webapp baseline with explicit Node server entrypoint

notes: Generates a Vite-first SSR baseline with explicit client/server entries and Vite SSR middleware dev flow.
Production startup stays a direct Node server entrypoint via server/index.ts.
Packaged SSR artifacts are deterministic: dist/server/index.js and dist/client/.
Canonical production startup is node dist/server/index.js.
dev and dev:ssr compose Vite SSR dev and a wasm producer watcher with deterministic logs.
dev:ssr:only runs only the Vite SSR middleware server path.
dev:wasm:watch rebuilds producer input and syncs src/wasm-contract/top.wasm in place.
SSR dev runs on http://127.0.0.1:5173 and renders / through Vite ssrLoadModule + transformIndexHtml.
Broken SSR wiring fails deterministically with SSR contract error messages.
Missing packaged SSR paths fail fast with deterministic contract errors for serverEntry/clientDir.
Scripts include dev, dev:ssr, build:ssr, and start:ssr for template-local iteration.
TARGETS keeps SSR intent explicit with framework:vite for later planner wiring.
